name: Rising Dragon Acquisition Corp.
business: Rising Dragon Acquisition Corp. is a blank check company incorporated as a Cayman Islands exempted company for the purpose of effecting a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, recapitalization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses. It has entered into a merger agreement to acquire HZJL Cayman Limited, with the combined company to be listed on Nasdaq.

exposures.sentence: we evaluated approximately three business combination opportunities in Asia and Europe, across a broad range of sectors including IT data center, industrial furnaces and high-end valve manufacturing

it is our intention to pursue prospective targets that are focused on green and sustainable business, new energy, cutting-edge technologies, artificial intelligent applications, business software and health care products.

catalysts.event: Entry into Merger Agreement with HZJL Cayman Limited
catalysts.sentence: On January 27, 2025, we, Xpand Boom Technology Inc., a Cayman Islands exempted company and a wholly-owned subsidiary of RDAC ( Purchaser ), Xpand Boom Solutions Inc., a Cayman Islands exempted company and a wholly-owned subsidiary of Purchaser ( Merger Sub, together with RDAC, Purchaser, the Purchaser Parties ), HZJL Cayman Limited, a Cayman Islands exempted company ( HZJL ), certain shareholder of HZJL ( Principal Shareholder ), and Mr. Bin Xiong, as representative of the Principal Shareholder of HZJL, entered into a Merger Agreement (the Merger Agreement ).

catalysts.event: Extraordinary General Meeting approving business combination proposals and redemptions
catalysts.sentence: RDAC held its Extraordinary General Meeting of shareholders (the EGM ) on November 20, 2025.

catalysts.event: Extension Meeting approving trust agreement amendment and redemptions
catalysts.sentence: RDAC held its Extraordinary General Meeting of shareholders (the Extension Meeting ) on December 12, 2025.
